'''Gim Sorzo''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] gunner on board the [[Rover (skiff)|''Rover'']] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. He went under the name [[Spacer First Class]] Sorzo. Under the command of Jedi apprentice [[Ben Skywalker]], Sorzo as well as Junior Lieutenant [[Beta Ioli]] and Chief Petty Officer [[Tanogo]] traveled to [[Terephon]] in order to rescue [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Zekk]]. Gim and Skywalker went EV with Jaina and Zekk before the Rover was destroyed during an attempt to contact Queen Mother [[Tenel Ka Djo]]. They were rescued by the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] shortly thereafter but were once again forced to jettison after the ''Falcon'' was heavily damaged during an assault by the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
